resolution.description:
Resolution in megapixels. Up to 4 MP is possible, but 2 MP or below is recommended. The maximum image size is 2048x2048, which means that high-resolution images may not respect the resolution if aspect ratio is not 1:1.

Resolution is not used when aspect_ratio is 'custom'. When aspect_ratio is 'match_input_image', use 'match_input_image' to match the input image's resolution (clamped to 0.5-4 MP).
resolution.description_zh:
分辨率（单位：百万像素）。最高支持 4MP，但建议使用 2MP 或以下。最大图像尺寸为 2048x2048，因此当宽高比不是 1:1 时，高分辨率图像可能无法严格遵守该分辨率。

当 aspect_ratio 为 'custom' 时不使用该设置。当 aspect_ratio 为 'match_input_image' 时，使用 'match_input_image' 匹配输入图像分辨率（限制在 0.5-4 MP）。

extra_lora.description: Load LoRA weights. Supports Replicate models in the format <owner>/<username> or <owner>/<username>/<version>, HuggingFace URLs in the format huggingface.co/<owner>/<model-name>, CivitAI URLs in the format civitai.com/models/<id>[/<model-name>], or arbitrary .safetensors URLs from the Internet. For example, 'fofr/flux-pixar-cars'
extra_lora.description_zh: 加载 LoRA 权重。支持 <owner>/<username> 或 <owner>/<username>/<version> 格式的 Replicate 模型、huggingface.co/<owner>/<model-name> 格式的 HuggingFace URL、civitai.com/models/<id>[/<model-name>] 格式的 CivitAI URL，或来自互联网的任意 .safetensors URL。例如，'fofr/flux-pixar-cars'
extra_lora.title: Extra Lora

extra_lora_scale.description: Determines how strongly the extra LoRA should be applied. Sane results between 0 and 1 for base inference. For go_fast we apply a 1.5x multiplier to this value; we've generally seen good performance when scaling the base value by that amount. You may still need to experiment to find the best value for your particular lora.
extra_lora_scale.description_zh: 确定额外 LoRA 应用的强度。基础推理的合理结果在 0 到 1 之间。对于 go_fast，我们对此值应用 1.5 倍的乘数；我们通常看到按该量缩放基值时具有良好的性能。您可能仍需要实验来找到适合您特定 lora 的最佳值。
extra_lora_scale.title: Extra Lora Scale

go_fast.title: Go Fast

lora_scale.description: Determines how strongly the main LoRA should be applied. Sane results between 0 and 1 for base inference. For go_fast we apply a 1.5x multiplier to this value; we've generally seen good performance when scaling the base value by that amount. You may still need to experiment to find the best value for your particular lora.
lora_scale.description_zh: 确定主要 LoRA 应用的强度。基础推理的合理结果在 0 到 1 之间。对于 go_fast，我们对此值应用 1.5 倍的乘数；我们通常看到按该量缩放基值时具有良好的性能。您可能仍需要实验来找到适合您特定 lora 的最佳值。
lora_scale.title: Lora Scale

lora_weights.description: Load LoRA weights. Supports Replicate models in the format <owner>/<username> or <owner>/<username>/<version>, HuggingFace URLs in the format huggingface.co/<owner>/<model-name>[/<lora-weights-file.safetensors>], CivitAI URLs in the format civitai.com/models/<id>[/<model-name>], or arbitrary .safetensors URLs from the Internet, including signed URLs. For example, 'fofr/flux-pixar-cars'. Civit AI and HuggingFace LoRAs may require an API token to access, which you can provide in the `civitai_api_token` and `hf_api_token` inputs respectively.
lora_weights.description_zh: 加载 LoRA 权重。支持 <owner>/<username> 或 <owner>/<username>/<version> 格式的 Replicate 模型、huggingface.co/<owner>/<model-name>[/<lora-weights-file.safetensors>] 格式的 HuggingFace URL、civitai.com/models/<id>[/<model-name>] 格式的 CivitAI URL，或来自互联网的任意 .safetensors URL，包括签名 URL。例如，'fofr/flux-pixar-cars'。Civit AI 和 HuggingFace LoRA 可能需要 API 令牌才能访问，您可以分别在 `civitai_api_token` 和 `hf_api_token` 输入中提供。

description: Professional inpainting and outpainting model with state-of-the-art performance. Edit or extend images with natural, seamless results.

guidance.description: Controls the balance between adherence to the text prompt and image quality/diversity. Higher values make the output more closely match the prompt but may reduce overall image quality. Lower values allow for more creative freedom but might produce results less relevant to the prompt.
guidance.description_zh: 控制遵循文本提示词与图像质量/多样性之间的平衡。较高的值使输出更紧密地匹配提示词，但可能会降低整体图像质量。较低的值允许更多的创作自由，但可能产生与提示词相关性较低的结果。
guidance.title: Guidance

image.description: The image to inpaint. Can contain an alpha mask. Must be jpeg, png, gif, or webp.
image.description_zh: 要修复的图像。可以包含 alpha 遮罩。必须是 jpeg、png、gif 或 webp 格式。
image.title: Image

mask.description: A black-and-white image that describes the part of the image to inpaint. Black areas will be preserved while white areas will be inpainted. Must have the same size as image. Optional if you provide an alpha mask in the original image. Must be jpeg, png, gif, or webp.
mask.description_zh: 描述要修复图像部分的黑白图像。黑色区域将被保留，白色区域将被修复。必须与图像大小相同。如果在原始图像中提供了 alpha 遮罩，则此项为可选。必须是 jpeg、png、gif 或 webp 格式。
mask.title: Mask

outpaint.description: A quick option for outpainting an input image. Mask will be ignored.
outpaint.description_zh: 输入图像外绘的快速选项。遮罩将被忽略。
